title: lathyrus luteus subsp. tournefortii
intro: Lathyrus luteus subsp. tournefortii, also known as yellow pea or yellow vetchling, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin problems. The plant's seeds, leaves, and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies, which have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus luteus subsp. tournefortii is often used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions for various health issues.
